cases.prompt: Review the diff since main and check both conventions and intent.
cases.expected_behavior: Separately evaluates repo conventions and whether the change matches its stated purpose.

cases.prompt: Review this PR against HEAD~3 and call out any coding-standard or behavior mismatches.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs a two-axis review against a fixed point.

cases.prompt: Can you summarize the latest branch for me?
cases.expected_behavior: This is a summary request, not a code review.

cases.prompt: Review the diff since commit abc123, but ignore a documented implementation-log deviation.
cases.expected_behavior: Respects documented deviations while reviewing conventions and intent.
